issues.description: SearchDeck action missing required filter condition for 'Baroque Works' type. DSL uses generic filter:{kind:Any} instead of filtering for cards with type 'Baroque Works'
SearchDeck action does not capture the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic - missing explicit deck peek/reveal limit of 5 cards
Second effect with trigger:Trigger and action PlaySelf has no basis in card text. Card effect ends after placing cards at bottom of deck - no self-play mechanic exists
Missing action to place non-selected cards at bottom of deck in any order. Card text explicitly requires this sequencing
